info.title: Dental Saas Backend System
info.description: A digital system where you can manage your patients and appointments

post.description: Register a new tenant and its owner user account
Login endpoint for JWT authentication.
Rotate refresh token and issue new access token.
Logout current device/session.
Logout from all devices.

get.description: Get current user info, including memberships and permissions
Get a list of users in the current tenant

post.description: Create a new user in the current tenant

get.description: Get a list of doctors in the current tenant.

schema.title: Response Get Doctors Api V1 Users Doctor Get

put.description: Restore a soft-deleted user in the tenant.
Update a user's role in the tenant.

get.description: List all patients for the tenant

post.description: Create a new patient for the tenant

get.description: Search patients by name, code, phone, or email

schema.title: Response Search Patients Api V1 Patients Search Get

post.description: Check if a patient with the same name, code, phone, or email already exists for the tenant

schema.title: Response Check Duplicate Patient Api V1 Patients Check Duplicate Post

get.description: Get a specific patient by ID

put.description: Update a specific patient by ID

delete.description: Delete a specific patient by ID

put.description: Restore a soft-deleted patient in the tenant.

get.description: Get the medical record summary for a specific patient

post.description: Create or update the medical record for a specific patient
Assign or change the primary doctor for a specific patient

get.description: List all linked family members of a specific patient

schema.title: Response List Family Members Api V1 Patients  Patient Id  Family Get

post.description: Link an existing patient as family member

delete.description: Unlink a family member from a specific patient

post.description: Create new appointment for patient
Create new appointment for walk-in patient

get.description: Get appointment detail with all the planned procedure

post.description: Confirm booked appointment
Check-in for scheduled appointment with token in return
Start appointment with all the planned procedure it consists of
Set the given appointment as completed
Reschedule appointment with updated doctor and appointment_date
create follow up for previous appointment
Call patient to chair
Skip queue token
Recall skipped queue token

get.description: Estimated wait time for a queue token
Public display endpoint (no auth, for TV screen)

get.summary: Get full encounter for an appointment
get.description: Returns the full clinical encounter with all nested data.

patch.description: Update vitals and chief complaint on an in-progress encounter.

post.description: Close clinical encounter.

schema.title: Response List Procedures Api V1 Encounters  Encounter Id  Procedures Get

post.summary: Upsert medical history snapshot for this encounter
post.description:
Create or fully replace the medical history for this encounter.
Sending again overwrites the previous medical-history snapshot.
item_id values come from MEDICAL_HISTORY_TAXONOMY (frontend static file).

Batch upsert examination form entries.
field_id values come from ON_EXAMINATION_TAXONOMY (frontend static file).
Sending again updates only the fields included — partial updates are fine.

schema.title: Response Upsert Examination Api V1 Encounters  Encounter Id  Examination Post
Response Get Examination Api V1 Encounters  Encounter Id  Examination Get

post.description:
Add one or more problems/findings to this encounter.
finding_code values come from DENTAL_PROBLEM_TAXONOMY.
Can be called multiple times — each call appends new findings.

schema.title: Response Create Findings Api V1 Encounters  Encounter Id  Findings Post
Response List Findings Api V1 Encounters  Encounter Id  Findings Get

post.description:
Replace all diagnoses for this encounter.
Exactly one must have is_primary=True (enforced in schema).
diagnosis_code values come from DENTAL_DIAGNOSIS_TAXONOMY.

Only DOCTOR role can set diagnoses.

schema.title: Response Create Diagnoses Api V1 Encounters  Encounter Id  Diagnoses Post
Response List Diagnoses Api V1 Encounters  Encounter Id  Diagnoses Get

post.description:
Order one or more investigations for this visit.
investigation_code values come from DENTAL_INVESTIGATION_TAXONOMY.

schema.title: Response Create Investigations Api V1 Encounters  Encounter Id  Investigations Post
Response List Investigations Api V1 Encounters  Encounter Id  Investigations Get

patch.description:
Fill in the result after an X-ray or lab result is available.
Status must be COMPLETED or CANCELLED.

post.description:
Create a treatment plan for this encounter.
Each item maps to a ProcedureCatalog entry.
visit_number groups items into future sessions.

409 if a plan already exists — update via PATCH instead.
Only DOCTOR role can create treatment plans.

post.summary: Perform a treatment plan item — creates a Procedure
post.description:
Doctor decides to perform a plan item NOW.

This is the critical transition point:
  TreatmentPlanItem (PENDING) → Procedure (COMPLETED)
  TreatmentPlanItem.status → DONE
  TreatmentPlanItem.performed_procedure_id → new Procedure.id

Returns the updated treatment plan with the item marked DONE.
Only DOCTOR role can perform procedures.

patch.summary: Defer a plan item to a future visit
patch.description: Mark an item as DEFERRED — will not be done today.

get.description:
Returns all taxonomy data: medical history items, exam fields, findings, diagnoses, and investigations. 
Frontend should fetch this once on app load and cache it. Supports ETag conditional requests.

DiagnosisBulkCreate.title: DiagnosisBulkCreate
DiagnosisBulkCreate.description:
DiagnosisValidatorMixin validates:
  1. Every diagnosis_name is in DENTAL_DIAGNOSIS_TAXONOMY
  2. Exactly one is_primary=True
Both checked in one pass, all errors collected before raising.

EncounterDetail.title: EncounterDetail
EncounterDetail.description: Full encounter with all nested clinical data.

ExaminationCreate.title: ExaminationCreate
ExaminationCreate.description:
ExaminationValidatorMixin checks field_id existence and
value correctness (e.g. select values must be in the options list).

MedicalHistoryCreate.title: MedicalHistoryCreate
MedicalHistoryCreate.description:
MedicalHistoryValidatorMixin.validate_items() runs automatically.
Any unknown item_id raises 422 with a clear message before the
service layer is ever called.

name.title: Name of the company or organization

TreatmentPlanCreate.title: TreatmentPlanCreate
TreatmentPlanCreate.description:
POST /encounters/{id}/treatment-plan
Creates the plan and all its items in one shot.

TreatmentPlanItemPerformCreate.title: TreatmentPlanItemPerformCreate
TreatmentPlanItemPerformCreate.description:
POST /encounters/{encounter_id}/treatment-plan/items/{item_id}/perform
Doctor decides to perform this item NOW.
Creates a Procedure and marks the item DONE.
